message:
fix(node): deep security audit batch — state machine guards, CRDT
determinism, quarantine hardening, revocation freshness, and supply
chain migration kit expansion

Session & state machine hardening:
- session_auth.rs: add explicit state-transition guards to activate(),
  begin_termination(), and terminate() — prevents invalid state
  transitions (e.g., Terminated → Active) that could bypass session
  lifecycle invariants

CRDT & connector:
- crdt.rs: replace string-based tie-breaking in LwwMap with
  deterministic lexicographic JSON comparison using serde_json, ensuring
  consistent merge outcomes across replicas regardless of insert order
- lease_service.rs: tighten lease renewal validation with boundary checks
- retention_policy.rs: minor correctness fix

Security subsystem:
- quarantine_controller.rs: expand quarantine entry validation with
  additional metadata checks and fail-closed boundary enforcement (+33
  lines)
- revocation_freshness.rs: overhaul freshness computation to use
  monotonic timestamps, add staleness threshold configuration, and
  harden against clock-skew scenarios (+41 lines refactored)
- zk_attestation.rs: simplify attestation verification path, remove
  redundant intermediate checks, consolidate error handling (+41 lines
  refactored)
- degraded_mode_policy.rs: add fallback escalation for degraded-mode
  transitions with explicit logging
- lineage_tracker.rs: minor lineage chain validation fix

Policy & runtime:
- compat_gates.rs: refactor compatibility gate checks for clarity and
  correctness (+38 lines restructured)
- hardware_planner.rs: significant restructuring of dispatch
  authorization and placement validation (+72 lines refactored)
- optimization_governor.rs: tighten budget accounting boundaries
- region_tree.rs: simplify region lookup path
- time_travel.rs: minor checkpoint validation fix
- divergence_gate.rs: refine divergence detection thresholds
- approval_workflow.rs: minor workflow transition fix

Supply chain:
- migration_kit.rs: major expansion with new migration path validation,
  rollback safety checks, and evidence artifact generation (+90 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
